input_summary.subtask: Explain the concept of an 'inactive journey' in the context of Adobe Experience Platform journeys.

answer_preview.preview: "An inactive journey in Adobe Experience Platform refers to a journey that has been paused, stopped, or is not currently processing events. This state typically occurs when a journey is manually disabled by an administrator, has reached its end date, or has been archived. Inactive journeys do not trigger actions or segment users until they are reactivated. They remain visible in the platform for historical analysis, auditing, or potential future reuse, but they are excluded from real-time decisi...
